---
title: "Logic"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Pipeline Logic & Data Normalization

The **uiao-core** repository functions as a compiler for infrastructure. It translates high-level intent defined in YAML into vendor-specific configurations and documentation.

## The Data Pipeline
How `program.yml` becomes a deployed configuration:

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHRZzCm48NVyoj6uRbx1GdnW3OD3HILKkqk81xTPEgQTJoHCu7D8luxZjEBWINPlDdpdUFZOobNDGlBJQcZ-awPIbXHmbhaTz9IOugKD5bublal80hSY4PpHeQNeaH8h1AXGs8j_TY9pwUNoOiq64x95cZ_DxMOip1Iup1MkOn2Za26U8H8SbRV5RV3L4fbHGODFp5wryj8y25a7sgGwHeU0euz_lsQivVPMJPxfCj_m6ds_8zdFxGrQdbiR1Hz8rYiHVs4dCMUVEGLD6uOcC0gkMKeL7TzHIRQQo2kB4ddSjAMEWPHmzVamo8wj0InH8DMC9vKBIn8gjnJgvQtpgQ3OJ9vlL_lAeFOax2ob6DTAoDZ-1cQlckhBPe9q-IJSPdhd2p2hHMcrgBBvy-uHZcxZtfdVqY_4TYyL-QRk81RB2kdmzhB_6RaMQ_grxz2NQhSYP0kvd0AoMhkdiLibFHgFugyngjxz1LyRBXg6Cv3cxdPq5hJFNpn9aBhFi7KxGKMtVBeS14w90-Dk_Zd9VBfykOjN3TwTma_23nwy61o6LsXATplwJS0)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

## The Normalization Engine

The `generate.py` script performs a critical translation step. YAML keys in the canon use hyphens (e.g., `A-01`, `site-location`) for readability, but Jinja2 template variables cannot contain hyphens. The `normalize_key()` filter converts all hyphens to underscores at load time.

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHFRzGm4CNl_XIZSEXfDwLGgTe3Qlvs1QY75ixLD9aDRXqxSYRGWFZkE2Qx6w0apJ7pc-StRn9VjeoMkrg9zb7g1YtMS8_5OsLDfyl4A6FXLUwV2L7I3Zl5kT5yZJL1P2LE5I9hpRUn-NNy9ZfF9iNOs9Bi_wgM2aPTAPh76kSHgmL86ruWeeBbLydzF9MOkZ6QDB_G-f3BWl4vP6zgbXaIdWEEEVwzpUmYFyspPxBy1uppjt-i_P3MekGniKKqHSPxR5_WizoJpsn1x8iGDDPK3b_tjO8Gi6b8bxAWTdWH0BOGYKCu45IaoIBJkkdXey7I4x68OBLw1p5iu0Fr6pXf9TDAcG9P6dqo5RWsjaObl_iAv58nMI-I33zEUdvnAc8lbaoxZgft1rNVbOh4qwax-eOgUjf06wx2kx0IuvuWU2_r0vwva3NJ4mVmOwfyuyOb2v-eRfIRoujc1okf5y-c3JoIwuSp3-SY7w6VKspm6XP6xsIrvk5KXrw9pADNpknjLxYGssdBwFEpCxIJcihCVRI_izcEZLlNcADKdQKDRFlc2sbtkR2Je59SkadSpVGB)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

### Key Pipeline Steps

1. **Load** — All YAML files from `data/` are read into a unified context dictionary.
2. **Normalize** — Hyphenated keys are converted to underscore format for Jinja2 safety.
3. **Render** — Each `.j2` template is rendered with the full context, producing Markdown files in `docs/`.
4. **Build** — MkDocs compiles the Markdown into a static site with Material theme.
5. **Deploy** — GitHub Actions pushes the built site to GitHub Pages.

### Schema Validation
Before any rendering occurs, the CI/CD pipeline validates `appendices.yml` against `schema.json`:

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![UIAO Architecture Diagram](images/unified_arch.png)

<details>
<summary>PlantUML source</summary>

![Architecture Diagram](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHFJzmm4CNl_XIZS6aFBA0M2VLGaN_UNTHMAv1wuZAR35cpZftQ3ksswdUlOtQNK9Q4N2p5l_SyyyR9fNLeN5jBPjT2DMYmXYKMwyheLfMfbjh04GzFZoZf3blfk5Rk6zO4iH7OTuYDqJ-tuhFaGtoUzZOJRKeoh-qQAXogIj8mrlWQiHg1b7OZH5muyI3SPfXATTreHSgziVGkbv72Xv1TKODCb_0Gy9JZ_zFCB_Wfpmza-G9C-CTdOz-dDMhvbDWecg739Tetr5dko0DJOBjDYB1fI9MY83lPr382j12pVHmGJONhwglzSWABwm0aB8RZuyz-tOO1KJe_IJDOY8QaK0Jll6pMBaC6Mjdt4Vpfct9onSgxXNQ2PSgIO9dsiIyQIx35YcgSt5kj0fdrYUyeXU-5Wj6jmWg5iWvkWYRWUVT1PkSNfomB1-GitQuzcttTDstXax11oLaUI0wVO87M7XHm5B8r50JJhM3g1TrxzhSloUY1f6x8GBgYOdshhkb7AmoLm0N9qlfukJOrkiVJPsmQp6RUB9PaNDyh_qL5wxkkI97nxK-QJH3D6G-Y-RDQswKKTWLVjRy7Ilp6RYGGEucF9rsnUH1TiKj_4_pFxHy0)

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>

</details>
